review_title: Elevate your e-commerce performance with Analyzify's conversion tracking capabilities
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Analyzify's ability to integrate data from multiple channels is highly valuable for businesses seeking a comprehensive view of their online performance. Its conversion tracking feature allows users to manage their metrics in a single, convenient location, and its fast support team is available to provide assistance as needed. Overall, Analyzify offers a highly effective solution for businesses looking to optimize their e-commerce performance.
cons: I looked for many reasons not to like it, but I couldn't find it!

review_title: Outstanding due to super reactive customer service
description: Analyzify will make sure that Shopify and Google Tag Manager will talk to each other with different Tags. Analyzify provides the needed Shopify scripts for Checkout and some magic in the themes (liquid) so that the integration works. This makes sure sure that conversion data can be accurately transferred to Google Ads, incl. Retargeting and Conversion data.
author: Julian L.
pros: - Analyzify team will deep dive to find solutions to problems you couldnt crack before. Example: GDPR/Cookie/Consent provider messed up scripts: they identified the cause (isense), recommended different provider (cookiebot) - They provided free of charge Google Ads consultancy with tangible recommendations - One stop shop data excellence: they know Google Tag Manager inside out and will be able to fix most common problems within the blink of an eye
cons: - Limitation by Meta: I thought that using analyzify we'd be able to significantly improve our data accuracy (using whatever options, i.e. Tag Manager, custom Checkout scripts, etc), but that didnt materialise

description: The GTM, GA set up is a complex matter to us. Thanks to the set up of Analyzify we were able to get it done it no time. The team at Analyzify responds fast and thorough. Great service!
author: Merel Y.
pros: Value for money. Great support. True time saver.
cons: Little to no custom solutions. That would have helped us even more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: UNIQUE answer to the problems of tracking in Shopify
description: Once you onboard Analyzify, you no longer need to bother about tracking issues or server-side configurations.
author: Gaurav S.
pros: There is nothing better than the incredibly extensive text on Analyzify's support pages; they even provide short video tutorials if you get confused.Integration with GA4, Google Ads, Tag Manager, and Facebook is superior to other alternatives, and server-side options are also available.One of the greatest post-purchase experiences we've had. Support crew is fantastic, they will do their utmost to resolve your difficulties, are very helpful, and respond quickly.
cons: Nothing we've encountered to date; we hope they reduce server-side tracking costs.

review_title: Must have shopify app for setting up GA4 and beyond.
author: Chris W.
pros: Team at Analyzify went above and beyond setting up GA4 and making sure all of our ecommerce data was property being tracked. Recommend to anyone trying to transition to google analytics 4.
cons: There is nothing that we dislike about this software.

review_title: Great effective product and superb suppport
description: Solved the problem we had with tracking.
author: iain C.
pros: Easy solution to get tracking and analytics for our website without having to go through and expensive developer.
cons: Not much that I felt was needed additionally

review_title: The perfect help for shopify sellers
description: We use Analyzify on many DTC brands/websites
author: Alexandre C.
pros: Analyzify team is perfect, can handle a lot of connections and I never encountered an issue coming from its side
cons: Analyzify team has sometimes too high level vocabulary for normal users ahah
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All you need for data analytics setup on Shopify
author: Panos S.
pros: Incredible productIncredible team with great support
cons: I would like to have more options on the app side.

review_title: good solution to integrate analytics and other pixels
description: we were looking for analytics and other statical integration found Analyzify we implemented and every thong is working fine since.
author: Anas A.
pros: over all a good product with excellent customer support
cons: Bit costly now. When we purchased it, price was affordable.

author: Rensso H.
pros: I spent month learning how to implement google tags and set up accounts and it was very difficult. The set up seems easy but there are always some malfunctions. Analyzify fixed everything and the customer service is excellent!
cons: There are no cons with them. They are really good at what they do.

review_title: Fa quello che in pochi sanno fare
description: Ottima ho un seti di dati sempre preciso e puntuale
author: Nicola B.
pros: L'assistenza clienti è eccellente, ho un set di dati precisi
cons: Politica dei prezzi e dell'abbonamento per l'assistenza

author: Kevad S.
pros: Very easy-to-use interface and super helpful customer support! I am not an expert in Google Analytics or Ads but this does a lot of job for me.
cons: At first, I felt a little unfamiliar with all the terms related, but there are good resources on Analyzify's side to walk you through everything.

author: Nikki W.
pros: I love the Google Data Studio they set up for me and the fact that our GA-4 is now sorted. They've also worked on speeding up the site which is fantastic. The support team are awesome and respond quickly.
cons: It is quite expensive but my time is worth more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Meli H.
pros: It's so easy to use. They make the set up so easy and their customer service is really good. They answer all my questions and very informative.
cons: I would like if they had a live chat. Although they respond quickly, having a live chat is better.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
